Table of Contents

Class PagoDTO

Namespace
BLL.DTOs
Assembly
BLL.dll

Projection of a Pago entity used as both input and output for payment operations.

public class PagoDTO
Inheritance
object
PagoDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

When used as input to PagoService.RegistrarPago, set ClienteID, Monto, Metodo, and optionally ReservaID or MembresiaID to indicate the payment type. Estado is overwritten by the service; callers should not set it. Id is initialized to a new Guid on construction.

Constructors

PagoDTO() 

public PagoDTO()

Properties

ClienteID

FK to the client who made the payment.

public Guid ClienteID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Codigo

Auto-incremented sequential code assigned by the database.

public int Codigo { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Detalle

Optional free-text detail or reference number for the payment.

public string Detalle { get; set; }

Property Value

string

EsMembresia

true when MembresiaID has a value; determines movement type inside PagoService.

public bool EsMembresia { get; }

Property Value

bool

Estado

Payment lifecycle status. Set by the service layer, not by the caller.

public EstadoPago Estado { get; set; }

Property Value

EstadoPago

Fecha

Timestamp of the payment. Defaults to DateTime.Now when not set.

public DateTime Fecha { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Id

Primary key, auto-assigned on construction.

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

MembresiaID

FK to the membership being paid, or null for non-membership payments.

public Guid? MembresiaID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid?

Metodo

Payment method label (e.g., "Efectivo", "Tarjeta").

public string Metodo { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Monto

Payment amount in currency units. Must be positive.

public decimal Monto { get; set; }

Property Value

decimal

ReservaID

FK to the reservation being settled, or null for non-reservation payments.

public Guid? ReservaID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid?
